name: 01_bronze_batch_pipeline
description: Bronze layer ingestion: loads raw sensor readings and reference data into the Lakehouse. Notebooks 00 and 01 run in parallel since they write to independent tables.

activities.name: Load_Reference_Data
activities.description: Run 00_reference_data_loader — loads static reference tables (building types, technology catalog, tariffs, regulations, simulation inputs).

activities.name: Load_Bronze_Sensor_Data
activities.description: Run 01_bronze_ingestion — loads raw sensor readings from IoT / CSV sources into bronze_sensor_readings_raw. Uses incremental watermark to avoid full reloads.

activities.name: Bronze_Completed
activities.description: Barrier activity — ensures both bronze notebooks finish before downstream pipelines start.
